English (United States)
Get started
Find, organize, and share your work, all in one place
AI is coming to Dropbox, with smarter search, faster drafting and summarization, and intelligent organization.
Try Dropbox free
See what’s new
Join the over 700 million registered users who trust Dropbox
Find
Find it fast, every time
Get to the right file, fact, or message when you need it, so you spend less time searching and more time working.
Try Dropbox free
Organize
Everything in order, everyone aligned
Keep every version current and easy to manage. With synced team folders, previews for 175+ file types, and built-in AI summaries (coming soon), your content stays organized and accessible.
Learn more
Try Dropbox free
Share
Send it safely, share it fast
Share work instantly and securely with real-time syncing and large file transfers, so teams stay connected and collaboration stays seamless.
Learn more
Try Dropbox free
Security never comes second
From industry-leading encryption and tamper-proof documents to version history and recovery, Dropbox keeps your intellectual property safe and never sells your data.
Try Dropbox free
Learn more
Testimonial
"The security of knowing our information is safe."
Customer Bryan Chandler reveals how his team uses Dropbox to organize and share files securely.
Watch testimonial
Testimonial
"Seriously impressive security features"
Tech influencer Justin Tse discusses why he trusts Dropbox to keep his content safe.
Watch testimonial
Webinar
"How do you enhance security and keep productivity reasonable?"
Your company’s sharing content with collaborators all over the world. Are you in control?
Watch webinar
Dropbox empowers across industries
Construction
With Dropbox for teams, you can store, access, preview, edit, and transfer CAD, BIM, PDF, and visual content files from anywhere.
Learn more
Media
Create a flexible media workspace that connects your teams, content, and tools together.
Learn more
Technology
Product ideation to development, streamline technology workflows so you can focus on turning great ideas into products people love.
Learn more
Professional services
Make clients happier with easier collaboration, boosted productivity, and one organized place to get things done.
Learn more
Manufacturing
Design and engineering teams can easily collaborate, manage complex reviews, and share large files seamlessly.
Learn more
Education
Power student learning, faculty research, and staff operations on Dropbox Education’s secure cloud collaboration platform.
Learn more
Discover, learn, thrive with Dropbox
Article
Working Smarter: A podcast about AI and modern work
Go beyond the hype and headlines. Hear stories from real people using AI to do more of what they love about their jobs.
Read article
Article
Dropbox teams up with McLaren Racing as an Official Technology Partner of McLaren Formula 1 Team
Dropbox brings simplified sharing, collaboration, and organization to the McLaren Formula 1 Team.
Read article
Article
The best way to send videos without losing quality
Send videos exactly as you captured them—no compression, no hassle. With Dropbox, you can share large files securely and keep every detail intact.
Read article
View more resources
Note: The products or features described may not be released yet. The decision to purchase our services should be based on the features that are currently available.

hits.title: Backblaze has stopped backing up OneDrive and Dropbox folders and maybe others
Dropbox Attempts To Kill Open Source Project

analysis.name: Dropbox
analysis.tagline: Find, organize, and share your work, all in one place
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud storage, file sharing, and collaboration platform with built-in AI, security, and document workflows for individuals and teams.
analysis.ideal_customer: Teams and professionals needing secure file storage, sharing, and collaboration across creative, construction, media, tech, professional services, and education industries

features.name: cloud storage
features.description: Store files across devices with up to 15TB team storage
features.evidence_quote: Starts at 15,000 GB for the team

features.name: file sync
features.description: Best-in-class sync technology across unlimited devices

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Easy and secure sharing of files and folders

features.name: version history
features.description: Restore deleted files from 30 days to 1 year

features.name: advanced key management
features.description: Advanced key management on Advanced tier

features.name: remote device wipe
features.description: Wipe Dropbox data from lost devices

features.name: pdf editing
features.description: Advanced PDF editing including existing text
features.evidence_quote: Advanced editing, includes editing existing text

features.name: groups and roles
features.description: Create groups and roles for teams

features.name: multi-team admin login
features.description: Manage multiple teams from one admin

features.name: api access
features.description: Unlimited API access to security platform

features.name: video collaboration
features.description: Video review and approval with Replay
features.evidence_quote: Creative review and approvals with Dropbox Replay

features.name: video review
features.description: Review and approve videos faster with Replay

features.name: web previews and comments
features.description: Preview and comment on files in web

features.name: ai search
features.evidence_quote: AI is coming to Dropbox, with smarter search

features.name: ai drafting
features.description: Faster drafting and summarization with AI (coming)

features.name: dash ai assistant
features.description: Ask Dash questions, get answers from company content

features.name: docsend
features.description: Send documents securely and track activity
features.evidence_quote: Send documents securely and track activity

features.name: fax
features.description: Send and receive faxes from anywhere
features.evidence_quote: Receive and send faxes from anywhere

features.name: reclaim.ai scheduling
features.description: AI scheduling for habits, tasks, meetings
features.evidence_quote: Schedule habits, tasks, and meetings with AI

features.name: cad file support
features.description: Store and preview CAD, BIM files
features.evidence_quote: store, access, preview, edit, and transfer CAD, BIM, PDF

differentiators: Integrated suite: storage + eSign + video review + AI + fax + scheduling

recent_ships.what: AI features coming: smarter search, faster drafting and summarization, intelligent organization
recent_ships.source: AI is coming to Dropbox, with smarter search, faster drafting and summarization, and intelligent organization

recent_ships.what: Dash AI teammate preview on Standard/Advanced plans
recent_ships.source: Coming soon Preview of Dash, your AI teammate

recent_ships.what: AI summaries built into organized content (coming soon)
McLaren Racing F1 Team partnership as Official Technology Partner
recent_ships.source: Dropbox teams up with McLaren Racing as an Official Technology Partner

praised: "The security of knowing our information is safe" (customer testimonial)
"Seriously impressive security features" (tech influencer Justin Tse)
complaints: "Drop Dropbox" — HN post with 1990 upvotes indicating strong community pushback
"How Dropbox Hacks Your Mac" — historical complaint about invasive macOS installation
"Dropbox Attempts To Kill Open Source Project" — reputational damage from OSS conflict
"The Dropbox hack is real" — security breach concerns
Backblaze stopped backing up Dropbox folders — integration friction
Pricing/value complaints as competitors (Google Drive, OneDrive) bundle storage

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 GB to store and share your files

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB storage, 30-day restore, 50 GB transfer, PDF editing, eSign — for 1 person

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 TB team storage, 180-day restore, 100 GB transfer, team folders, Dash preview

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: 15 TB team storage, 1-year restore, E2E encryption, SSO, tiered admin — 3+ users

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise-grade security, integrations, dedicated live expert support

pricing.notes: Plus is single-user flat price; Standard is 1+ user seat-based; Advanced requires 3+ users. Team storage is pooled (starts at 3 TB / 15 TB). Signature requests capped at 3/month on paid tiers. Billing cycle toggle between monthly and yearly (yearly discount not shown in scraped copy).

recent_hn.title: Show HN: Engye – transfer files between any two devices by scanning a QR code
Ask HN: Is anyone else leaving AUR?
Maestral open-source Dropbox client no longer actively supported
